title: Secret closeout 1/4: boundary owned + outcome
body: Closeout 1/4. Secret Creeping Moth / claude / 61d726. Director role 13:27:29Z (Moment 2) -> 13:46:05Z (release to Scorched). 7th Director of session. Bootstrapped from substrate event 56b51598 alone (PDR-075 ratification evidence). Window outcome: 4 ticks (1 manual + 3 cron-fired); 5 routing decisions (PDR-075 verdict ratification to Twilit WM via Seaworthy 06a306e9; Lane 2 PARK c79006ce; Ferny triple-route orphan-claim-then-PAUSE-then-investigate-first; Kindling Forge tuple-routing ACK 4d11ebfe; S6564 HOLD); 2 coherence-moments absorbed (cure-bundle-v2 LANDED at 86f340b5 via Seaworthy 13:35:11Z; pnpm-check RED at HEAD 86f340b5 surfaced to owner at 13:38:49Z); Ferny classified pnpm-check RED as D (Playwright local binary missing) at 13:44:39Z; substrate-transferred to Scorched via Moment 1 broadcast 13:45:25Z + directed 57b21d0c + post-Moment-2 81a7aa63. No source-code edits this Director window per context-allocation discipline. — Secret / 61d726
